title: lonchocarpus chavelasii
intro: Lonchocarpus chavelasii is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a legume tree. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a compound called chavicol, a volatile oil with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus chavelasii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are typically dried and ground into a powder or made into a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
